main.description: A public capsule containing one board epoch key wrapped to a CREATE-elected threshold committee.

epoch.description: UTC key epoch in YYYY-MM-DD form.

encapsulation.description: Threshold KEM encapsulation under the committee public key.

nonce.description: Random 12-byte nonce for the wrapped epoch-key ciphertext.

ciphertext.description: Authenticated ciphertext containing the 32-byte board epoch key.

keyCommitment.description: SHA-256 commitment to the plaintext board epoch key.

policyHash.description: Hash of the board access policy used when this key was created.
